display_text: Venom Gland. Cost: 0, Tier N/A: Non-purchasable item providing a strong DoT and debuff amplification. Actively applies 25 damage per second and +25% spell damage amplification debuff for 6 seconds. Ideal for ganking and burst magic combos as it amplifies all subsequent spell damage on the target.
